ques: Research the new features of the iOS 17 on Apple support and check its compatibility with the iPhone 12.
answer: iOS 17's new features include Contact Posters, Live Voicemail, StandBy, NameDrop/AirDrop improvements, FaceTime video messages & Reactions, Live Stickers, Check In, the Journal app, interactive widgets, offline Maps, and smarter autocorrect/Siri. iOS 17 is available for "iPhone Xs and later," so the iPhone 12 IS compatible.
